FANG.Name: Ninjo's FANG
FANG.Subtitle: Character (PC/NPC) Relationships
FANG.KeybindingHint: Opens the interactive FANG Actor relationship graph.

UI.QuickConnectHint: Enable, then tap or click two nodes on the graph.
UI.SearchToggleHint: Open or close the search overlay (local only).
UI.SearchCloseHint: Close search and reset filter (local only).
UI.ShowPlayersHint: Shows the graph to all players in a normal window
UI.ShowMonitorHint: Shows the graph in fullscreen only on the monitor
UI.ClosePlayersHint: Closes the graph for all players
UI.ManageFactionsHint: Create and manage factions for tokens.
UI.CloseMonitorHint: Closes the graph window on the Monitor/Player display.
UI.CenterGraphHint: Zooms and pans the graph so that all tokens are visible.
UI.GroupByFactionHint: Arrange nodes into faction clusters on the canvas.
UI.ResetFactionGroupingHint: Return to the default force layout.
UI.ToggleCenterHint: Magnetically pins the NPC to the center (e.g. for Boss enemies).
UI.SyncCameraHint: Broadcast your camera position and zoom live to all players and the monitor.

Background.Title: Background Settings
Background.Hint: Tailor the atmosphere of your graph. These changes are synchronized live for all players.
Background.PremiumHint: This feature is currently available for free. In the future, it will be part of the supporter benefits (Patreon).

Journal.Title: About FANG
Journal.WarningText:
DO NOT DELETE THIS JOURNAL!
This journal stores all FANG graph relationships and player lore notes. Deleting it will irrevocably destroy your graph and all associated notes.
Journal.Desc1: This journal saves the graph data in the background.
Journal.Desc2: To open the graph, click the button below or press Shift + G on your keyboard.

Messages.ImportError: Failed to import graph: Invalid file format.
Messages.ConfirmImport: Importing a file will OVERWRITE your current graph. Are you sure?
Messages.GraphShown: FANG Graph is now shown to all players!
Messages.GraphMonitorShown: FANG Graph is sent to the monitor in fullscreen!
Messages.PlayersCanEdit: Players can now edit the graph.
Messages.PlayersCannotEdit: Players can no longer edit the graph.
Messages.WarnNoGMOnline: A Game Master must be online to save changes to the graph.
Messages.FactionGroupingInsufficient: Need at least two factions with assigned nodes to group.
Messages.JournalMissing: No FANG Graph Journal found. A GM must open this tool first.
Messages.SaveNoPermission: No permission to save the FANG Graph.
Messages.WarningSelfLink: A token cannot be connected to itself!
Messages.WarningNoLabel: Please enter a label for the connection.
Messages.WarningNoDeleteSelect: Please select an element to delete.
Messages.WarningNodeOnly: Please select a node (token), not a connection.
Messages.CenterEnabled: is now magnetically pulled to the center.
Messages.SpectatorEnabled: Spectator Mode enabled. Your camera is now synced.
Messages.SpotlightHiddenBlocked: Reveal the character first before using Spotlight!
Messages.QuickConnectEnabled: Quick Connect enabled: choose the source, then the target.
Messages.QuickConnectSourceSelected: Source selected: {name}. Choose the target now.
Messages.QuickConnectSameNode: Source and target must be different.
Messages.PlayerLoreMissing: A GM needs to create the player notes journal first.
Messages.PlayerLoreCreateGMOnly: Only a GM can create the initial player notes journal.
Messages.LockStompConfirm: {user} is currently editing. Take over anyway?

ActorEditor.Title: Edit Actor
ActorEditor.HiddenPlayerEditHint: This contact is still hidden. You can edit the player-facing name, notes, and visible status markers without revealing GM secrets.

Dialogs.RoleContent: Enter a role or faction for {actor} (optional):
Dialogs.DeleteFactionConfirm: Really delete faction {name}? Tokens in this faction will lose their assignment.
Dialogs.AssignJournalContent: Select how you want to link the journal {journal} to {actor}.
Dialogs.DeleteNodeContent: Are you sure you want to delete this token from the graph? Your Player Lore notes will be kept safe.
Dialogs.DeleteLinkContent: Are you sure you want to delete this connection?
Dialogs.GMNotesHint: Drag & Drop a Journal Entry here, or click to open.
Dialogs.QuestLogHint: Visible to players as a Questgiver mark. Drop Journal here.
Dialogs.BtnConvertPlayerJournalHint: Converts this simple text note into a dedicated, player-editable Foundry Journal. This gives you and the player full text formatting freedom.
Dialogs.QuestAddHiddenHint: New quests are hidden from players until you reveal them.
Dialogs.DiploGlassSyncContent: DiploGlass was detected. Do you want FANG to automatically sync factions from DiploGlass (one-way)?
Dialogs.QuestDropHint: Drop a Journal here to add it as a hidden quest.
Dialogs.ActorDropAliasHint: The alias is only used when you add the token hidden.

History.Title: Title
History.PlayerTextHint: Safe text players may see if published.

Auto.RelationshipText: A connection between {source} and {target} becomes visible.

TokenSize.Name: Token Size
TokenSize.Hint: Define the default visual size of tokens in the graph. Labels and spacing will scale automatically. (Default: 40)

CosmicWind.Name: Cosmic Wind (Floating Tokens)
CosmicWind.Hint: When enabled, tokens will gently drift and float on the graph once the initial physics simulation has settled. This gives the graph a dynamic, magical, and breathing feel.

CosmicWindStrength.Name: Cosmic Wind Strength
CosmicWindStrength.Hint: Determines how far the tokens drift across the graph. (1 = Barely visible, 10 = Strong swaying).

CenterNodeColor.Name: Center Aura Color (Hex)
CenterNodeColor.Hint: The color of the magical ring around tokens pinned to the center. Enter a Hex color code (e.g. #d4af37 for Gold, #8b0000 for Dark Red).

AllowPlayerEditing.Name: Allow Player Editing
AllowPlayerEditing.Hint: If enabled, players can create and delete connections, and drop tokens onto the graph.

DefaultHidden.Name: Default Hidden Mode
DefaultHidden.Hint: If enabled, new tokens dragged onto the graph are automatically hidden for players. You can reveal them later via the context menu.

ThemeVariant.Name: FANG Theme
ThemeVariant.Hint: Choose the visual design used by the FANG window for all users.

InPersonGaming.Name: In-Person Gaming Mode
InPersonGaming.Hint: Enables special monitor controls for tabletop gaming (e.g., second screen monitoring).

MonitorDisplayName.Name: Monitor Display Name
MonitorDisplayName.Hint: The name of the user or display (e.g., 'Monitor') used for the public viewing view.

ReplaceOnlySheetActor.Name: Only-Sheet: Replace Actor Button
ReplaceOnlySheetActor.Hint: If the 'Only-Sheet' module is active, FANG will hide the original actor open button and replace it with a custom button that opens the standard Foundry Actor Directory.

DiploGlassOneWaySync.Name: DiploGlass One-Way Faction Sync
DiploGlassOneWaySync.Hint: If enabled, FANG automatically imports and updates factions from DiploGlass world settings (one-way only).

Physics.Title: Physics & Simulation
Physics.Hint: Determine how much the tokens drift across the graph.

Placeholder.PlayerCreateHint: Creates a visible placeholder contact. A GM can add role, faction, and secret details later.
Placeholder.Name: Display Name
Placeholder.DropContent: Do you want to replace {target} with {actor}, or create a relationship?
